issues: Handling of special keys is incomplete. For example, [iteration5_issue2] still applies; backspace and caps_lock are included but not all other special keys (line references in on_press function).
Readability could be improved by adding comments to explain the purpose of each part of the code and defining constants for strings like '[SPACE]', '[ENTER]' (file and error handling sections).
summary: Code functions mostly correctly with good use of exception handling, but some improvements in alignment to the goal and readability are needed.
